pages.text: 1 Sample PDF Created for testing PDFObject This PDF is three pages long. Three long pages. Or three short pages if you ’ re optimistic . Is it the same as saying “ three long minutes ” , knowing that all minutes are the sam e duration , and one cannot possibly be longer than the other ?
